author: mrbese
name: BESE Tokenizer — Novel Structured Encoding
blurb: Novel BESE tokenizer (38 structured base tokens + 249 BPE merges = 287 vocab) replacing SentencePiece-1024. 33% fewer tokens per byte (0.51 vs 0.76). Built on PR #1019 architecture (XSA-all-11, GPTQ int6, Muon, EMA/SWA, BigramHash 3072x112).
technique_summary: BESE-287 tokenizer + XSA-all-11 + GPTQ int6 + BigramHash 3072x112 + LZMA9 + TARGET_MB 15.9
